title: Delete Recommendation Type
content:
# Delete Recommendation Type

Permanently delete an existing Recommendation Type. An error will be returned if there are any current Recommendations linked to the Recommendation Type. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /recommendations/types/{name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.recommendation.deleteRecommendationType()
print(response)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Recommendation Type key `name` to delete. Case sensitive name.
